title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is expanding AI adoption with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a large Java upgrade 6x faster. The company projects delivering 40% more capabilities in 2026 through expanded AI-assisted development.
